headline: Jim Cramer Notes He Likes Ulta Beauty
summary: Ulta Beauty, Inc. (NASDAQ:ULTA) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer looked at. Cramer highlighted that he liked the stock, as he commented: Third theme is the trade downers.
